# TEXITcoin

> TEXITcoin (TXC) is a Layer 1, proof-of-work digital currency mined in Texas — sound money for a sovereign Lone Star State. Live on Bitmart since 2024.

TEXITcoin is a community-driven cryptocurrency built for everyday peer-to-peer use: fast 3-minute blocks, no pre-mine, 353M max supply, and a foundation rooted in honest money and Texas independence.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TEXITcoin, the network, and how to get involved.
- [Buy TXC](/buy): How and where to buy TEXITcoin.

- [Proof of Work](/proof-of-work): Consensus and mining mechanics.
